title: YOUTH RESIDENTIAL AND OUTPATIENT - 211info
text: YOUTH OUTPATIENT YOUTH RESIDENTIAL AND OUTPATIENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a full-continuum of essential care for substance use and co-occurring behavioral health disorders outpatient treatment. Also provides information and guidance in accessing treatment and services. 548 SE Jackson Street Roseburg, OR 974705412 Eligibility: Youth with addiction and/or co-occurring mental health challenges Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 229-8934 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 229-8934 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and assessment FEES: Accepts most major insurance plans and Oregon Health Plan. Offers a sliding scale fee for uninsured patients DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, Douglas, and Josephine Counties Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Adolescents Specialized Information and Referral * Drug Use Disorder Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: INFORMATION SERVICES - PREVENTION AND EDUCATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YOUTH OUTPATIENT
